final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI components arranged in a layered, hierarchical layout — web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls all visible
Subject: must include all UI components:
  - Web Dashboard panel
  - Mobile interface screen
  - Card components
  - Button components
  - Control widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a dark tech-environment backdrop — exact depth and spatial treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-tech atmosphere with strong depth and layering — exact glow, bloom, and light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact accent colors, gradients, and contrast ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or flat-panel surface treatment — exact sheen and layering weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five UI component categories as clearly distinguishable elements in the composition
Avoid:
